title: carex subramosa
intro: Carex subramosa, also known as the creeping sedge or subramosum sedge, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex subramosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Carex subramosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in poultices and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
